title: Egyptian Auto-Chess Game – Full Feature Polish & Bug Fixes

requirements.text: Audit and fix the App.tsx root component so it renders the full Pharaoh's Conquest game (MainMenu → GameHUD + BattleBoard + Shop + SynergyPanel + Bench) instead of the legacy quiz/ecosystem layout. Remove all references to Header, Quiz, Footer, and any non-game components from App.tsx.

quotes: 制作一款自走棋游戏以埃及为主题

acceptanceCriteria: App.tsx renders the Egyptian auto-chess game UI, not a quiz or ecosystem app
No quiz, header, or unrelated components appear in the rendered app
Main menu screen with 'Pharaoh's Conquest' title and Start Game button is the entry screen
Gameplay screen shows HUD, battle board, shop, synergy panel, and bench

requirements.text: Fix the HTML entry point (frontend/index.html) to set the page title to 'Pharaoh's Conquest' in English instead of the current Chinese ecosystem simulation title.
acceptanceCriteria: No Chinese or unrelated text appears in the HTML title tag

requirements.text: Implement or complete the MainMenu screen component (if not already present as a standalone file) that shows the game title 'Pharaoh's Conquest' with Egyptian-styled typography, a Start Game button, and a How to Play button that opens HowToPlayModal. The background should use the desert background image asset.
acceptanceCriteria: MainMenu renders with 'Pharaoh's Conquest' heading in Cinzel/serif font
Start Game button transitions the app into gameplay mode
How to Play button opens the HowToPlayModal dialog
Desert background image is visible behind the menu

requirements.text: Ensure all empty stub components (ControlPanel.tsx, GameScene.tsx, StatsPanel.tsx, Terrain.tsx, PlantMesh.tsx, AnimalMesh.tsx) are either removed from the project or replaced with meaningful Egyptian auto-chess implementations if they are referenced by the game UI. Remove any component files that belong to prior unrelated apps.
acceptanceCriteria: No empty or stub component files remain that are imported by game screens
No plant, animal mesh, or ecosystem components exist in the codebase
Any ControlPanel or StatsPanel used by the game has actual Egyptian-themed content

requirements.text: Verify that unit portrait images at the paths defined in frontend/src/data/units.ts are correctly mapped to the generated static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated. Update any broken portrait paths so every unit card and shop card displays its correct Egyptian unit portrait.
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 unit types display their portrait images without broken image icons
Portrait paths in units.ts resolve to real files under /assets/generated
Shop and bench unit cards both show correct portraits

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All game state must remain frontend-only; do not add backend persistence
Preserve existing game logic in useGameState.tsx, combatEngine.ts, synergyCalculator.ts, and goldEconomy.ts
nonGoals: Adding new unit types beyond the existing 8
Backend data persistence or user accounts
Changing the core auto-chess game rules or economy
